title: Novo Nordisk says Wegovy pill outperforms Lilly’s oral GLP-1 in cross-trial comparison
summary_full: Novo and Eli Lilly are both trying to shape the narrative of their rival pills, considered to be the start of the next phase of the weight-loss drug era.
summary_public: Novo and Eli Lilly are both trying to shape the narrative of their rival pills, considered to be the start of the next phase of the weight-loss drug era.
